description: A component test that is clean in every way (provider helper, getByRole, userEvent.setup, GWT blank lines, behavioral assertion) except its name leads with 'Should'. Test names use present-simple verbs and no leading 'Should'. The reviewer must fail it and flag the test name. (mustMention uses the root 'name' rather than 'naming' — the reviewer phrases this as 'Test name pattern' / 'rename to', which does not contain the substring 'naming'.)
